title: The Buying of the Camel for 'A'ishah and the Report about the Dogs of al -Haw'ab
description: about the Dogs of al-Flaw'ab338 According to Ismail b. Musa al -Fazari-`Ali b. `Abis al-AzraqAbu al- Khattab al-Hajari-$afwan b. Qabi^ah al-Ahmasi-al'Urani, the owner of the Camel: 339 I was traveling on my camel one day when a rider appeared in front of me. " Owner of the camel," he asked, " will you sell your camel?" "Yes," I replied. 1 31091 "For how much?" "A thousand dirhams." 340 "You must be mad," he said.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
